mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_order (user_id, worker_id, title, description, address, contact_phone, status, priority, image) VALUES (#{userId}, #{workerId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{address}, #{contactPhone}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{image})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, r.worker_id AS workerId, w.name AS workerName, w.avatar AS workerAvatar, r.title, r.description, r.address, r.contact_phone AS contactPhone, r.status, r.priority, r.result, r.image, r.assign_time AS assignTime, r.finish_time AS finishTime, r.create_time AS createTime, r.update_time AS updateTime FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user w ON r.worker_id = w.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user w ON r.worker_id = w.id WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.description, r.address, r.status, r.priority, r.create_time AS createTime, u.name AS userName, w.name AS workerName, w.avatar AS workerAvatar, CASE WHEN e.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasEvaluation, e.score AS evaluationScore, e.comment AS evaluationContent, r.result, r.image, CASE WHEN r.status = 'pending' THEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), r.create_time) ELSE NULL END AS pendingDays FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user w ON r.worker_id = w.id LEFT JOIN evaluation e ON e.repair_id = r.id WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY CASE r.status WHEN 'pending' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE r.priority WHEN 'urgent' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_order WHERE worker_id = #{workerId} AND status IN ('assigned', 'processing')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_order WHERE user_id = #{residentId} AND status IN ('pending', 'assigned', 'processing')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_order
WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM repair_order WHERE create_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND create_time <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.description, r.address, r.status, r.priority, r.create_time AS createTime, u.name AS userName, w.name AS workerName, w.avatar AS workerAvatar, r.image FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user w ON r.worker_id = w.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
